items.name: Seven-Full-Stack-Transportation-Management-System
items.description: 这是一个基于 Next.js 16、React 19、TypeScript 构建的单仓全栈运输管理系统，采用 App Router 组织页面与路由，在同一套代码里同时承载前端界面、服务端渲染页面、Server Action 表单提交、导出/备份接口以及数据库访问逻辑。前端界面使用 Tailwind CSS 4 构建后台管理 UI，配合 lucide-react、class-variance-authority、clsx、tailwind-merge 做组件样式组织；服务端运行在 Node.js 上，数据层通过 Prisma 5 访问 MySQL。

items.name: aspnetcore11-minimalapis-oteljaeger_contagemacessos-simulacaofalhas

items.name: Monitoramento-de-logs
items.description: Analisa milhões de linhas de logs de um servidor para detectar tentativas de invasão.O monitoramento de logs de login é um projeto clássico de Cybersecurity + Big Data. Ele demonstra que você sabe lidar com dados semi-estruturados, fluxos constantes e detecção de anomalias (como ataques de força bruta).

items.name: Pensieve
items.description: Observe how memory shapes an answer.  Pensieve is an interactive system for visualizing, interpreting, and managing how Large Language Models (LLMs) “remember” a user. It bridges the gap between model-level mechanisms and user-level understanding, making AI memory observable, explainable, and partially controllable.

items.name: AI-Based-Autonomous-Navigation-System
items.description: Built in Python and Streamlit, the AI-Based Autonomous Navigation System is a simulation dashboard bridging software and robotic hardware. It integrates A* pathfinding with C-Space safety, real-time YOLOv8 object detection, and simulated motor telemetry, demonstrating how autonomous agents perceive, plan, and execute safe physical trajectories.
